title: It'S My Birthday!
lyrics:
[verse 1]
I woke up—it’s MY day!
Cake with sprinkles, hip hooray!
Dinosaur PJs on me,
Spin me round so wild and free!

[chorus]
It’s my birthday, shout it loud!
Jump up high and dance so proud!
Mama hugs me, Daddy spins—
Fun begins with happy grins!

[verse 2]
Crown with dots so bright and new,
Stuck it on—it’s purple-blue!
Blow the candles—one, two, three!
Eat the cake—yum, yum for me!

[chorus]
It’s my birthday, shout it loud!
Jump up high and dance so proud!
Mama hugs me, Daddy spins—
Fun begins with happy grins!

[ending]
Now my eyes feel tired-sweet,
Snuggle close and kiss my feet.
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, full musical production, acoustic guitar, bass, and finger snaps, 126 BPM, groovy and melodic, catchy hook, warm rhythm, clear warm vocal, strong singalong chorus, every word easy to understand
instruments: acoustic guitar, bass, and finger snaps
scene: Sunlight spills through the kitchen curtains at 7:03 AM as tiny feet hit the linoleum—your child bursts in, still in dinosaur pajamas, clutching a crayon-scrawled "BIRTHDAY!" sign, eyes wild with the explosive realization: *today is THE DAY*, and they launch into a spinning, shrieking hug around your legs.
cover_description: Tiny kid in dinosaur PJs spins in kitchen sunlight, crayon sign flying.
